text:
Created attachment 161450
FreeDiameter Server v1.2.0 port implementation (with options  and rc script)

Dear Sirs, based on e-mails I've sent/received to/from Nikola Kolev, here it goes a port implementation for FreeDiameter Server v1.2.0 (with options, rc script,etc), in order to get a running service out-of-the box.

Comments are welcome!

Regards,
Pablo.
